creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 149165
diff to the latest version.

Update to new version 2.0b5.

This has some small fixes and cleanups but the most notable change is that BeanShell is now under an Apache License V2.


In FreeBSD's port this is particularly important as we have been using a binary until now.

FWIW, The code has actually been in process of transferring to the Apache Software Foundation for a while and it's being staged here:

http://code.google.com/a/apache-extras.org/p/beanshell/
